svg.title: The AI company CEO operating map
svg.desc: A visual map of the capabilities an AI company CEO should connect: frontier literacy, strategy, product, governance, and institution building.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: Connect the frontier to the institution.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: The role is not to chase every model release. The role is to translate intelligence into durable advantage.
